Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Excise Tax Act (school authorities)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Excise Tax Act (school authorities)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Excise Tax Act in order to increase the goods and services tax rebate rate for school authorities from 68% to 100%.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Paragraph (c) of the definition specified percentage in subsection 259(1) of the Excise Tax Act is replaced by the following:

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: in the case of a school authority, 100%,
